name: Swiss-Sauced Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the broccoli and remove any outer leaves and tough parts of the stalks.
2. Cut the broccoli stalks lengthwise into uniform spears, following the branching lines.
3. In a 1-quart casserole, combine the broccoli, water, and 1/8 tsp salt.
4. Micro-cook, covered, on 100% power for 5 to 6 minutes or just until tender. Let stand, covered, while preparing the sauce.
5. For the sauce, in a 1-cup measure, micro-cook the butter or margarine, uncovered, on 100% power for 30 to 45 seconds or until melted.
6. Stir in the flour, salt, and pepper.
7. Stir in the milk. Micro-cook, uncovered, on 100% power for 1 to 2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
8. Stir in the shredded Swiss cheese until melted.
9. Drain the broccoli.
10. Serve the sauce atop the broccoli.
